title: changes to allow for darwin compilation

comments.body: LGTM, once you can get it to compile.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably fd12c89) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I'm going to merge this in the interest of moving forward.  Moreover, buildah needs this commit to also compile darwin.
